full_text:
Sun Zicai
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Zicai. Due to Lü Meng’s victory over Xie Qi, he fled to Wu. Sun Zicai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
